raw.message: Your Favorite Card Game, Now With Cash

hook.summary: Rapid solitaire gameplay with a fast-climbing money counter.
hook.visual_action: Cards are moved to foundations while a green money bar at the top increments quickly from $12 to $63.
hook.text_overlay: You received $63 USD from SOLITAIRE CASH

scene_flow: Fast-paced solitaire gameplay showing cards being cleared and a money counter rapidly increasing.
Pop-up notifications appear showing specific dollar amounts received from the app as the counter hits $429.
A leaderboard screen highlights the top player winning a $426 cash prize.
Final splash screen with the game logo, payment methods (PayPal, Visa, Venmo), and a 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: You received $63 USD from SOLITAIRE CASH
You received $72 USD from SOLITAIRE CASH
Winnings are based on skill and shouldn't replace income
audience_proxy: Casual adults who enjoy classic solitaire and are motivated by the potential for real-money rewards.
